channel.title: RothecaMyricoides
channel.description: RothecaMyricoides 的个人博客 / Personal blog for project notes, technical writeups, and occasional thoughts.

item.title: 不完全算栈欺骗，但确实有效：注入后模块践踏的 Elastic 与 MDE P2 实测 / Not Quite Stack Spoofing, but It Works
item.description: 在受控实验环境中，对注入后模块践踏在 Elastic Security 与 MDE P2 中的执行结果、阻断动作和遥测可见性进行对比观察。 / A controlled-lab comparison of execution outcome, prevention response, and telemetry visibility.
